subcodes.first_line: These are the Days of God, and the horizon of the luminous Manifestation of the Supreme Pen is in motion, while the Kawthar of utterance floweth forth with the verses of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام الهی و افق ظهور نورانی قلم اعلی در حرکت و کوثر بیان جاری آیات الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
